title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when updating a RACING GAME
gherkin:
Given there exists a "RACING GAME" "Assetto Corsa"
When the user updates the node "Assetto Corsa" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | name | Forza Motorsport 7_2 |
  | release_year |       |
  | developer |       |
  | publisher |       |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value |
  | name | Forza Motorsport 7_2 |
  | release_year |       |
  | developer |       |
  | publisher |       |
